title: aster coronopifolia
intro: Aster coronopifolia, also known as the western marsh aster, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aster coronopifolia are thought to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
